resource.prompt: can you add  fa fucniton that remembers the repo next time? so if i send it from jules, it'll attach itself tot hat repo, and remmber it

gitPatch.suggestedCommitMessage:
feat: remember last selected repo in new session dialog

Saves the last selected repository to local storage and uses it as the default when opening the dialog. Ensures that the saved repository is still valid.
